name: dosely-firestore-rules-tests
description: Unit tests for /firestore.rules. Runs against the local Firestore emulator via @firebase/rules-unit-testing. Kept out of the iOS test target so a Xcode build does not require Node — see CLAUDE.md.

scripts.test: firebase emulators:exec --only firestore 'tsc --noEmit false --module commonjs --outDir build firestore_rules.test.ts && mocha build/firestore_rules.test.js --timeout 20000'
scripts.test:ci: tsc --noEmit false --module commonjs --outDir build firestore_rules.test.ts && mocha build/firestore_rules.test.js --timeout 20000
